---
title: Quizzes with team-support - questions
author: Wouter van Amsterdam
date: 2026-07-07
format: 
    #latex:
        #documentclass: beamer
        #lof: true
        #lot: true
    #html:
        #toc: true
        #toc-depth: 2
        #number-sections: true
    revealjs:
        theme: umcu.scss
        # theme: [umcu.scss, ../custom_dev.scss]
        incremental: true
        width: 1600
        height: 900
        logo: umcu_blue.png
        center: true
execute:
    warning: false
    message: false
categories:
    - SCM
    - DAG
    - day2
bibliography: bibliography.bib
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| echo: false
#| execute: true

suppressMessages({
  library(purrr)
  library(data.table)
  library(ggplot2); theme_set(theme_bw())
  library(knitr)
})
```

## Individual quizzes with team support

- each made 2 rounds of 6 qeustionns questions individually
- round 1: select which question to discuss with team 
- round 2: question for team discussion is randomly pre-selected
- Questions:
  1. what is the effect of team discussion on question answer correctness?
  2. draw a directed acyclic graph for the problem
  3. what do you expect in terms of association between team discussion and final answer correctness
    - in round 1?
    - in round 2?
  4. can you design an analysis for answering the question using the data we generated?
